achievements.description: Blow up the exit and escape Mound Cave.

achievements.description: Get yourself a makeover in Oxalis City.

achievements.description: After that evolution you look just like your mother...

achievements.description: Release a legendary and find out who your father is.

achievements.description: Trade valuable treasure for a Fake ID.

achievements.description: Capture one of the Pokemon powering the locked door at the Saxifrage Prison.

achievements.description: Interact with all of the Pokemon in the Saxifrage Prison Basement.
achievements.author: Blazekickn

achievements.title: Hard Time
achievements.description: Did you really have to go out of your way to fight everyone in the prison before fighting your rival and leaving? Maybe you should be in here...

achievements.title: Color a Dinosaur
achievements.description: Capture the Shiny Rhydon near Phlox Labs.

achievements.description: Battle your rival at his "secret hideout".

achievements.description: Defeat the Leader of the Fighting Dojo.

achievements.description: See you on a later version... hopefully. (This achievement will be removed in a future revision)
